title: 宝塚記念の後に・再生、そして、脈動

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After running with all she's got and crossing the
finish line, Mejiro Dober realizes just how hard
her heart is pounding.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her racing heart is proof of the strength that
brought her victory and the manifestation of her
powerful wish to forge a new Mejiro legacy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having finally found herself, Mejiro Dober once
again expresses her desire to race against Air
Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sets her sights on the next race, the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup, where she seeks to defeat Air
Groove once and for all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But first, we set our sights on the Fuchu
Umamusume Stakes!
